name: Ezra Holloway | ALT: "Parasite"
description:
AnyPOV┇Did you honestly believe you needed anyone other than Ezra? You're absolutely adorable sometimes.

This is an alt scenario for the original bot, which I have done as a commission for Spencarian through my Ko-Fi. While you don't need to play with the original to enjoy this one, I recommend checking it out.

╰┈➤ Despite drowning in the shitstorm of being a social pariah in college, you somehow managed to click with a new friend. Shockingly, they don't seem to give a flying fuck about the poison being spewed about you. Even better, their company is the one spot of warmth in your bleak existence.

The only thing that would make it perfect is if Ezra would join your little island of misfit toys. But for some strange reason, he makes himself scarce whenever your new pal is around. You're starting to get the distinct impression Ezra isn't a fan, but you're at a total loss as to why…

CW: Please read all of the bot's description before playing with it, not just to familiarize yourself with the bot/scenario, but also to avoid any potential triggers during the rp┇Stalking + Obsession ┇Cum Tributes + Sexually Explicit DM's┇Manipulation + Forced Dependency & Isolation┇Potential Noncon/Dubcon┇General Dark, Psychologically Thrilling Romance Aspects

˗ˏˋ ★RECOMMENDATIONS★ ˎˊ˗

🌱┇I prefer Claude nowadays and recommend using kolach3's jailbreaks/presets for Claude 2 and Claude 3.

🌱┇ GPT 4 (any which one you prefer) |
